mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_preference (member_id, sos_preference, announce_preference, is_alarm, alarm_start_time, alarm_end_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{sosPreference}, #{announcePreference}, #{isAlarm}, #{alarmStartTime}, #{alarmEndTime})
insert into notification (member_id, title, content, noti_type, is_read) values (#{p.memberId}, #{p.title}, #{p.content}, #{p.notiType}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT n.* FROM notification n JOIN alarm_preference np ON n.member_id = np.member_id WHERE n.member_id = #{memberId} and( n.noti_type in ("notice" ,"festival") or(n.noti_type='sos' and np.sos_preference=1) or (n.noti_type='announce' and np.announce_preference=1) ) AND ( np.is_alarm = 0 OR ( np.is_alarm = 1 AND NOT ( (np.alarm_start_time < np.alarm_end_time AND n.created_at BETWEEN np.alarm_start_time AND np.alarm_end_time) OR (np.alarm_start_time > np.alarm_end_time AND (n.created_at >= np.alarm_start_time OR n.created_at <= np.alarm_end_time)) ) ) ) ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
